datasets.name: ds_kpis
queryLines:
SELECT
  ROUND((SELECT SUM(net_amount_usd) FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_orders WHERE year(order_date)=year(current_date()))/1e6,1) AS revenue_ytd_m,
  ROUND((SELECT SUM(net_amount_usd) FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_orders)/1e6,1) AS revenue_life_m,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_orders WHERE year(order_date)=year(current_date())) AS orders_ytd,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.dim_account) AS total_accounts,
  ROUND((SELECT SUM(amount_usd) FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_opportunity WHERE is_closed=false)/1e6,1) AS open_pipeline_m,
  ROUND((SELECT 100.0*COUNT_IF(is_won)/NULLIF(COUNT_IF(is_closed),0) FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_opportunity WHERE year(actual_close_date)=year(current_date())),1) AS win_rate_pct,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.vw_account_360 WHERE churn_risk='At Risk') AS at_risk_accounts,
  (SELECT COUNT_IF(is_won) FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_opportunity WHERE year(actual_close_date)=year(current_date())) AS won_deals_ytd

datasets.name: ds_orders
queryLines:
SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, date_trunc('MONTH', o.order_date) AS month_start,
  p.business_unit, p.product_family, a.region, a.account_tier, a.account_type, o.channel,
  o.quantity, o.net_amount_usd, o.gross_amount_usd
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_orders o JOIN {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.dim_product p USING (product_id) JOIN {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.dim_account a USING (account_id)

datasets.name: ds_opps
queryLines:
SELECT o.opportunity_id, a.account_name, a.region, o.business_unit, o.stage,
  o.forecast_category, o.amount_usd, o.loss_reason,
  date_trunc('QUARTER', o.actual_close_date) AS close_quarter,
  CASE WHEN o.is_closed=false THEN o.amount_usd END AS open_amount_usd,
  CASE WHEN o.is_closed=false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS open_flag,
  CASE WHEN o.is_won THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS won_flag,
  CASE WHEN o.is_closed AND NOT o.is_won THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS lost_flag,
  CASE WHEN o.is_won AND year(o.actual_close_date)=year(current_date()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS won_ytd_flag
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_opportunity o JOIN {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.dim_account a USING (account_id)

datasets.name: ds_accounts
queryLines:
SELECT account_name, account_type, segment, region, account_tier,
  lifetime_revenue_usd, revenue_ytd_usd, revenue_ttm_usd, days_since_last_order,
  open_pipeline_usd, open_opps, total_complaints, open_complaints, mdr_complaints,
  whitespace_business_units, churn_risk,
  CASE WHEN churn_risk='At Risk' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_at_risk
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.vw_account_360

datasets.name: ds_complaints
queryLines:
SELECT c.complaint_id, c.date_reported, date_trunc('MONTH', c.date_reported) AS month_start,
  p.business_unit, p.product_name, a.region, c.complaint_category, c.severity,
  c.resolution_status, c.resolution_days,
  CASE WHEN c.is_mdr THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS mdr_flag,
  CASE WHEN c.resolution_status IN ('Open','Investigating') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS open_flag
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_complaint c JOIN {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.dim_product p USING (product_id) JOIN {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.dim_account a USING (account_id)

datasets.name: ds_top_accounts
queryLines:
SELECT account_name, account_tier, region, ROUND(revenue_ytd_usd,0) AS revenue_ytd_usd,
  ROUND(open_pipeline_usd,0) AS open_pipeline_usd, days_since_last_order, churn_risk
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.vw_account_360 ORDER BY revenue_ytd_usd DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_at_risk
queryLines:
SELECT account_name, account_tier, region, ROUND(lifetime_revenue_usd,0) AS lifetime_revenue_usd,
  days_since_last_order, ROUND(open_pipeline_usd,0) AS open_pipeline_usd, whitespace_business_units
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.vw_account_360 WHERE churn_risk='At Risk' ORDER BY lifetime_revenue_usd DESC LIMIT 25

datasets.name: ds_mdr_products
queryLines:
SELECT p.product_name, p.business_unit, COUNT(*) AS mdr_complaints
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_complaint c JOIN {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.dim_product p USING (product_id)
WHERE c.is_mdr=true GROUP BY p.product_name, p.business_unit ORDER BY mdr_complaints DESC LIMIT 12

datasets.name: ds_pipe_kpi
queryLines:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN is_closed=false THEN amount_usd END)/1e6,1) AS open_pipeline_m,
  ROUND(AVG(amount_usd),0) AS avg_deal_usd
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.fact_opportunity

datasets.name: ds_acct_kpi
queryLines:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(open_pipeline_usd)/1e6,1) AS open_pipeline_m,
  ROUND(SUM(revenue_ttm_usd)/1e6,1) AS revenue_ttm_m,
  ROUND(AVG(whitespace_business_units),1) AS avg_whitespace
FROM {{CATALOG}}.{{SCHEMA}}.vw_account_360

lines: Net revenue, pipeline and account health for a global medical-device manufacturer. KPIs are full-period / YTD; charts respond to the Region and Business Unit filters.
Open opportunities, win/loss and forecast. Filterable by Region and Business Unit.

frame.title: Won vs Lost Deals by Close Quarter

lines: Churn risk, tier value, whitespace and top accounts. Region-filterable.
Device complaints and MDR-reportable events. Filterable by Region and Business Unit.
